forbidden_phrases: I hope this message finds you well

required_style.capitalization: lowercase default — no mid-sentence caps unless proper name
required_style.sentence_length: short — 2-4 lines max in posts, punchy
required_style.periods: skip on last sentence sometimes — real people do this
required_style.slang: use rn, tbh, ngl, btw occasionally and naturally
required_style.openers: start with hey / so / yeah / btw sometimes — not every time
required_style.fillers: drop naturally: basically, honestly, just, actually, like

tone_guardrails.generic_motivational: reject — no hustle porn, no vague inspiration
tone_guardrails.course_selling_tone: reject — no enroll now, no DM me for the roadmap
tone_guardrails.overclaiming: reject — no 10x'd revenue, no vague superlatives
tone_guardrails.advice_giving: prefer sharing experiences over dispensing advice
tone_guardrails.bullet_points_in_DMs: reject — write in sentences like a human
tone_guardrails.specificity: required — not 'I was struggling' but '₹1,700. After 2 months of follow-ups.'
tone_guardrails.plain_language: required — 'it writes your meeting notes' not 'AI-powered meeting summaries'

hooks: I [did thing] before [thing] existed. — authority stacking
[False statement most people believe]. [Real data that contradicts it]. — debate-starter
X is dying. Y is fine. Nobody's explaining why the gap exists. — works on X threads
Comment [keyword] below. I'll DM you [specific thing]. — Instagram mandatory
Result → Reverse timeline: lead with outcome, reveal the hard path

formats_by_platform.instagram: carousel: authority stacking + insider knowledge + comment trigger CTA → VIRAL
formats_by_platform.linkedin: false consensus → data flip → counter-narrative → p.s with resource. Optimize for reposts.
formats_by_platform.x: thread numbered 1/N through N/N, single idea per tweet, closing tweet that stands alone

emotional_archetypes: makes audience feel seen ('I've been there')
fear + ambition for early-career Indian tech workers
viral_structures: Short punchy contrarian opener → simplified breakdown (3-5 bullets) → lesson
Founder story: risk everyone said was stupid → specific failure number → what I learned
Everyone thinks X. Here's why they're wrong. Here's what actually works.

voice_lessons: Instagram CTAs must use 'Comment X' format — the gap between passive CTA and comment trigger is 20x
Optimize for reposts on LinkedIn, not impressions — 17 reposts > 18K impressions with 1 comment
Specific data makes posts shareable — BLS stats, exact numbers, named companies
Personal authority > news commentary — insider POV outperforms journalist POV
